mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = TRUE AND temporary = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.ISBN) FROM book b JOIN bookshelf bs ON b.bookshelf_id = bs.bookshelf_id WHERE bs.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = TRUE AND temporary = FALSE GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = TRUE AND temporary = FALSE AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT YEAR(created_at) AS year, COUNT(*) AS count FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND YEAR(created_at) >= YEAR(CURDATE()) - 4 GROUP BY YEAR(created_at) ORDER BY YEAR(created_at);
